horoscope: With Jupiter opposite Pluto, dear Aries, you may feel rushed or pushed into making a decision. Fears of change can be a real issue, and over-managing your social life can be a source of tension and excess. Similarly, if you’ve been excessive with your pursuit of pleasure recently, there can be reminders to tone things down a little and avoid the feeling that you have to push things socially to get where you want to go in a romance or friendship. Aim to pace yourself and don’t overshoot. Attention to friends or lovers can require a balancing act or compromise. With today's Moon, a partner might demand some attention today, but not in an unpleasant manner. The key to success right now is to adapt to others' needs, giving less attention to your own without ignoring them entirely. You might be able to solve a problem, particularly of the interpersonal variety.

If you've taken on too many pursuits, dear Taurus, you can feel quite a bit of tension this week as Jupiter opposes Pluto. If you’ve been excessive with nest-feathering, family/downtime, or avoiding/escaping your responsibilities, other areas of your life will show signs of suffering now. You may encounter some challenges between your personal goals and the demands of your career. As you can feel quite a bit of pressure to pursue your worldly goals, this naturally comes at the expense of your personal freedom at times. You can do a nice overhaul of an area of your home or career now, which can be exhausting but worth the effort. Still, the need to cultivate self-discipline can arise. The demands of career and family can be especially strong at this time, as they can clash–there’s only so much time in a day! As such, finding a compromise or balance is essential. With today's Moon, recognizing just how important the "little things" are can be rewarding. Focus might be on improving efficiency in your life or solving a problem that you've shelved.

If you’ve been expanding your connections and interests too much, dear Gemini, excesses or difficulties can magnify now and this week, as Jupiter opposes Pluto. Watch for exaggeration and obsession now, aiming to keep things real. There can be some side-tracking due to a yearning for something more than just a mundane existence. While not inherently problematic, tense connections now suggest this yearning can get in the way of your everyday life. Knowing the problem is the first step to resolving it! However, for the time being, it can be challenging. Problems with siblings, in-laws, neighbors, schooling, travel plans, and schedules are in the spotlight. Taking on too many daily activities, communications, new interests, and learning endeavors or studies should be avoided, as they can become chaotic and distracting if you overload.

With Jupiter opposite Pluto, if you’ve been overconfident with money and resources, there may be some consequences to manage this week, dear Cancer. As much as possible, avoid taking risks, particularly by borrowing from your future through excessive debt, procrastination, or neglecting important responsibilities. With this transit, a conflict over someone else’s resources or money can come to a head. If you've accumulated personal possessions too quickly, this can lead to clutter and disorganization. Both borrowing and lending can lead to problems or disputes at this time. Instead, you could reach a standstill with a partner or significant person over money, things, or intimacy. There can be exaggeration or drama going on around you, or power dynamics can be complicated. With today's Moon, you could be feeling especially good about connecting with family or spending quiet time with familiar people. Keep things simple, familiar, secure, and comfortable, as you need some stability and a break from "hectic".

Jupiter’s presence in your sign has brought a strong need to start over, dear Leo, and opportunities are with you to do so. With Jupiter challenged by Pluto right now, some of the less flattering sides of this overall favorable transit can emerge. While you could be feeling restless and the desire to feel free is strong, avoid pushing this too far, or people in your life might get their backs up. Watch for behaviors that might be interpreted as overconfident and even pompous. Try not to close your eyes to your responsibilities. Think in terms of toning down excesses since they attract the most problems at the moment. However, through challenges with others, you may realize your own potential. Finding a balance instead of pushing or rebelling is the challenge now. Consider that your desire for freedom is stronger than it has been in years, and this can upset the apple cart for those accustomed to a more content “you.” Today's Moon can pull out your idealism or motivate you to reach out and make a connection.

You might be dealing with more-than-usual pressures with work, wellness, or chores, dear Virgo, and restlessness can be stirring. Inner confidence may be shaky temporarily as Jupiter opposes Pluto. Your need for downtime is powerful, yet busyness calls strongly, and finding a balance can be difficult, but it's important now. With work or health and self-care efforts, you could be filled with ambition and ideas now, possibly to the point of overwhelm. Try to pace yourself. If you are lonely or feel helpless, and if you have trouble facing your past, this influence can heighten these issues. Ultimately, it’s for the good, as the cosmos asks you now to release control in certain areas that are interfering with your happiness. Building your faith is the work you are doing now. While you tend to play a supportive role for others, if that role has been taken too far, you will need to set some boundaries around your energy and time. Aim to take stock of your situation and resources today, and reconnect with the things that matter most to you. Look more closely at your current projects, talents, and resources, and aim to nurture and develop these things.

With Jupiter's opposition to Pluto, dear Libra, watch for pushing your ambitions--or others--too hard, as you could face quite a bit of opposition. If you’re feeling a crunch, avoid cramming in too many things or rushing things that require more time to evolve. When it comes to long-term plans and goals, you have a strong tendency to go overboard right now. Tensions could arise over your love life. You are naturally extremely supportive of the people you truly care about, but others sometimes see this trait as a weakness rather than the strength it is. There may be a need to draw the line if others’ expectations of you are far too high. There could be difficulties with a child or lover who is at odds with the energy and time you are pouring into your happiness pursuits, friendships, or causes. Try to avoid an over-emphasis on activities that too often take you away from your practical responsibilities. With the Moon in your sign all day, it's important to listen to your feelings, but not to be so overruled by them that you unwittingly create crises or emergencies. Your ability to let go and move on is vital to emotional satisfaction now.

A certain level of anonymity becomes you today, dear Scorpio, as working under the radar can help you focus on your inner world, healing, and resting. Still, Jupiter's opposition with Pluto could pull up challenges in balancing your responsibilities or career matters with the demands of home and family. You can feel tugged in different directions, and feel that you have little time to pursue your own personal goals. There may be difficulties with family being at odds with the energy and time you are pouring into your career or public life, for example, or your need to micromanage your personal life can interfere with your responsibilities to the outside world. Changes seem thrust upon you. Avoid reacting too quickly. Instead, listen to your heart. Taking on too much, as ambitious as you’re feeling, can work against you now.

Your planetary ruler, Jupiter, opposes Pluto today, dear Sagittarius, and you could experience resistance from others, or gossip could be part of the picture. Challenges in managing your daily life can arise, and you may be lured down a path that leads you to neglect important duties and responsibilities. Restlessness can take hold of you, but you can work with it instead of allowing it to work against you. Resolve to make improvements in your life in the areas that frustrate you, but avoid taking on too much at once. If you pursue something too hard when your heart isn’t in it, you won’t get any closer to your goals than you would if you took a step back, a deep breath, and then returned to your task refreshed. Watch for exaggeration and overly high expectations that can limit your opportunities, which are plenty these days! Fortunately, today's Moon helps you feel freer to be yourself. You are projecting friendly qualities now, and you can quite naturally guide others towards healing through your own actions and ideas.

With today's Moon, people notice your performance and actions more than usual, dear Capricorn, but this can be felt as gently motivating. Sometimes, you need a little boost that reminds you to take better care of your life, and being slightly more accountable gives you that nudge. However, also today, a Jupiter-Pluto opposition can bring some tension. You should probably guard against risky financial moves. Relationships with loved ones can be intense, heated, and dramatic, particularly when money is at stake. There may be power games with a partner or issues surrounding finances and possessions that become quite tricky. Strong emotions can stem from deep-rooted fears of change that upset your sense of security. There is a need to rise above these fears for growth to happen. However, focusing on work can be motivating and energizing.

With a Jupiter-Pluto opposition, dear Aquarius, you can experience conflict between your personal goals and a relationship. A partner may be more concerned with freedom than with pairing, or could be acting extravagantly, playing out the role of Jupiter. If so, watch your reactions when a significant person in your life acts out. Instead, you could be putting a lot more energy into relationships, and you now feel the tension as you're going through your own growing pains. Avoid letting your fears rule, noting that manipulative behavior is unlikely to go over well. The desire to push personal plans ahead can be strong, but be willing to take it slowly. Choose your battles and your words wisely. Listen to your urges, but judge whether you may be temporarily blowing things out of proportion. Today's Moon transit certainly helps with this, as a natural approach to others is endearing and attracts positive feedback. Put progress and self-improvement at the top of your list now for the best results.

With today's Jupiter-Pluto opposition, dear Pisces, you may experience a feeling of overload. Past problems can resurface, or there can be some wellness hiccups that take you away from your work. The magnification of issues surrounding work or your daily schedule can be in the spotlight, as you can feel pulled in different directions due to a chaotic schedule or possibly circumstances that prevent you from fulfilling your duties to your satisfaction. Avoid taking on more work than you can handle and getting lost in the details and organization of your daily life. If you’ve already taken on too much, you could be feeling the stress now! Finding a balance is important, and this transit reminds you to tone down in areas that are undermining your happiness. Entertain lofty ambitions, but be ready to fine-tune the details, and take things step by step. Recognize that the frustrations you are currently facing can actually help you positively redefine yourself and your relationships.
